channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Precise Asset Management Leads to Impactful Zero Trust Initiatives
item.description: Federal agencies are shifting their attention towards strengthening cybersecurity defenses by implementing a holistic IT asset management (ITAM) solution, central to achieving this objective is the ability to implement a zero trust framework with complete asset transparency and optimized defense against risks.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
